overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in red armor walking through a traditional East Asian temple complex. The character moves along wooden walkways and gravel paths before ascending stairs into a wooden temple structure on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden walkway alongside temple main hall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wooden walkway beside traditional temple building with red armor visible

entered.detail: large traditional wooden temple structure with curved roof and ornate railings
wooden fence running along the right side of the walkway
well-maintained green bushes between walkway and temple building
traditional stone lantern visible in the distance near trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden walkway beside a traditional wooden temple. Trimmed hedges line the path between the walkway and the temple structure, while a wooden fence runs along the right side and a stone lantern stands in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: gravel approach to temple entrance stairs

events.description: ground surface transitions from wooden walkway to gravel path

agents.ego_description: continuing forward on gravel path toward temple entrance stairs

notable_agents.action: figure in white clothing standing near wooden fence in the distance

entered.detail: gravel surface replacing the wooden walkway
wooden stairs leading up to the temple entrance becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to gravel as the character approaches the temple entrance stairs. The temple wall looms closer on the left, and a distant figure in white clothing becomes visible standing near the fence on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden stairs leading into covered temple entrance

events.description: character begins ascending wooden stairs toward temple entrance
entering the covered temple entrance area with reduced sky visibility

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs leading up to the temple entrance, passing by an NPC standing to the right

notable_agents.action: character in white and beige clothing standing near wooden fence, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: large wooden entrance structure with pillars and elevated platform
stationary character figure in light-colored clothing near the fence
thick wooden pillars supporting the temple roof overhang

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the wooden stairs into the temple entrance. An NPC in light-colored clothing stands near the fence to the right. The surroundings become more enclosed as the character approaches the temple interior, with large wooden pillars framing the entrance and the sky becoming mostly obscured by the roof structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open temple garden into the enclosed entrance of a traditional wooden structure. It begins with the character walking along a wooden walkway flanked by trimmed hedges and a distant stone lantern. As the path transitions from wood to gravel, the temple wall looms closer on the left while a figure in white clothing appears near a fence on the right. The scene then shifts as the character ascends a set of wooden stairs, moving past the standing NPC toward the temple entrance. Finally, the surroundings become increasingly enclosed as large wooden pillars frame the view and the roof structure obscures the bright sky.
